## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of what problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen, including any relevant API or configuration design.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered and why they don't meet your needs.

## Affected Components

Which part(s) of the system would this feature affect?

- [ ] Signal Generation / ML
- [ ] Risk Management
- [ ] Order Execution
- [ ] Broker Integration
- [ ] Portfolio Management
- [ ] Dashboard / UI
- [ ] Configuration
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Testing / CI
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Implementation Sketch

If you have ideas about implementation, describe them here:

```python
# Example API or config structure
```

## Impact Assessment

- **New dependency required?** Yes / No (if yes, list which)
- **Breaking change?** Yes / No
- **New config keys needed?** Yes / No (if yes, suggest defaults)
- **Database migration required?** Yes / No

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues/PRs for this feature
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's architectural principles (self-hosted, vendor-independent, open-source)
- [ ] This feature is feasible without mandatory cloud dependencies or SaaS lock-in

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request here.
